◎简　　介  

　　根据克劳斯·鲍姆加特和蒂尔·施威格的同名儿童绘本改编，A rabbit is discriminated by all the other rabbits and even by the fox for having no ears. He just wants to have a friend, when an egg rolls to his front door.
